title: fix: clean up enter dashboard sidebar
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A tidier dashboard
gist.blurb: We gave the dashboard sidebar a quick polish! Enjoy a sleeker logo, handy new footer links, and a slightly lighter app payload.
gist.summary: Polished the dashboard sidebar by optimizing the logo size, adding essential footer links, and removing development tools from the production bundle.
gist.impact: Users get a cleaner dashboard interface with quick access to policy links, while the app runs slightly leaner without devtools.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny toolbelt, adjusting a glowing UI panel (sidebar) on a retro monitor. The monitor robot is helping her organize.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny toolbelt, adjusting a glowing UI panel on a retro computer monitor. The chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
